import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    let b = match bopt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        let v = if neg
          -current
        else
          current
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        current = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    let v = if neg
      -current
    else
      current
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end
let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let n = a.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let x = match a.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let y = match b.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = x + y
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
  i = i + 1
end
